ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city or town */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "display_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the location is displayed */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Availability status of the location */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the location is situated */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the location is situated */,
  "search_terms" TEXT /* Search terms for the location, separated by a delimiter */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the location in square kilometers */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the location data was updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the location was first created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the location */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the state is situated */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Primary timezone of the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the state data was updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the state was first created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the state */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Primary timezone of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the country data was updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the country was first created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the country */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_data" TEXT /* JSON object containing the versioned data */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the version change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_versions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry clerk, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the user account was updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the location */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the location was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_search_terms" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search term */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location associated with the search term */,
  "search_term" TEXT /* Individual search term for the location */,
  "search_weight" REAL /* Weight or relevance score for the search term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_search_terms_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
